content.en:
After a long time.

The Qinglong Palace Lord said: "True Martial Palace Master, if you make a move, once you kill multiple Invincible Dao Ancestors, I'm afraid that the half-step domain ancestors hidden in the dark will also make a move, and it will be difficult to hide your identity at that time!"

"You mean the half-step domain ancestor of Black Wind Mountain?" the True Martial Palace Master frowned.

"No, it's not just referring to Black Wind Mountain!" the Lord of the Qinglong Palace said: "I suspect that the three major Nine Heavens forces each have a half-step domain ancestor, some people have not shown up for a long time, the Vast Sea Ancestor said that the three Nine Heavens forces have always had hidden powers, and it is inconvenient for the Vast Sea Ancestor as the realm lord to explore the internal situation of the Nine Heavens forces." Actually, I didn't let his Heavenly Emperor Palace expose his plan, and I was also worried that the three major Nine Heaven Forces would have three half-step domain ancestors, if Black Wind Mountain had two more half-step domain ancestors, it would be five half-step domain ancestors, and our Heavenly Emperor Palace would only have three half-step domain ancestors!"

"Yes, my father did!"

The main road of the White Tiger Palace.

This rumor was also heard by the True Martial Palace Master, but he didn't believe it very much.

Black Wind Mountain had a half-step domain ancestor, he believed it, but those three major Nine Heavens forces would have a half-step domain ancestor?

Of course, this possibility is not impossible.

"If they really have a half-step domain ancestor, I can just lure them out this time, otherwise the Nine Heavens Force has hidden power, this is a hidden danger!" said the main master of the True Martial Palace.

"Yes, True Martial Palace Master, then please take action!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord and the White Tiger Palace Lord said in unison.

......

Huoyan is taboo, outside the space where the Haotian Emperor Mirror is located.

Ten Invincible Dao Ancestors were fighting.

Among them, there are three Invincible Dao Ancestors of Scattered Cultivation, two Invincible Dao Ancestors of Tianhai Sect, two Invincible Dao Ancestors of Mitian Sect, two Invincible Dao Ancestors of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple, and one Invincible Dao Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain.

The three Scattered Cultivation Invincible Dao Ancestors joined together, after all, they had no power and belonged to a lonely family, so they temporarily cooperated, but Black Wind Mountain only produced one Invincible Dao Ancestor this time, which made the Invincible Dao Ancestors of the three Nine Heavens forces feel a little strange.

They didn't think that Black Wind Mountain only had one invincible Dao Ancestor, after all, there were many ten kings in the history of Black Wind Mountain who were comparable to the reputation of the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor, and several invincible Dao Ancestors would inevitably be born.

But the invincible Dao Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain didn't come out, and that was a good thing.

Boom Boom Boom !!

The Ten Invincible Dao Ancestors continued to attack, causing the surrounding magma areas to shatter and the rules to be chaotic.

But no matter how they fight, they can't shake this large-scale forbidden treasure land, and they can't blow up the large-scale forbidden treasure land, after all, the invincible Dao ancestors can only exert their weak strength at present.

As the battle continued, the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor was not lightly injured, after all, he was the only one, and many Invincible Dao Ancestors tended to attack him.

No matter how strong he is, where can he beat many invincible Dao Ancestors!

"Everyone, it's useless for us to continue fighting like this, besides, it's still unknown whether the Ancient Mirror Forbidden Arcana can evolve the Domain Ancestor Path, and it's ridiculous for us to fight each other for an unknown, right?"

Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor persuaded.

"Get out, Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor, don't think that if you say that, we won't kill you! If you have the ability, you can call your other invincible Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain out, otherwise we will kill you today!" The invincible Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect roared angrily.

He was the most unpleasant to the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor, and it was the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor who prevented him from killing the Fire King from the beginning, otherwise he would have killed the Fire King a long time ago and taken away the forbidden treasure!

Therefore, he very much wanted to kill the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor.

The Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor sighed, not responding to the Peerless Dao Ancestor at all.

It was impossible to call other invincible Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain to come out, this time Black Wind Mountain had already decided to send him only one Invincible Dao Ancestor, and he didn't dare to send too much.

They vaguely guessed that this time it was the great conspiracy of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and Black Wind Mountain also knew that the Heavenly Emperor Palace was causing the major forces to fight, and used the lives of countless True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors to promote the evolution of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm towards the Forbidden Realm.

Therefore, they didn't dare to expose their full strength, nor did they dare to send multiple invincible Dao Ancestors at once, otherwise if they were pitted to death, Black Wind Mountain would be miserable.

As time passed, the disadvantages of the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor became more and more serious, and the injuries gradually worsened.

Abrupt.

A figure appeared not far away.

The man was wearing a mask, wrapped in a set of forbidden armor, and only sensed the strong taboo rules, but could not sense other breaths.

This set of forbidden armor is a forbidden weapon, and it is also a very rare full-body defensive weapon, and the mask is also a forbidden weapon, which can hide the breath.

Seeing this person, all the invincible Dao Ancestors stopped, and their expressions changed drastically.

"Half-step domain ancestor!"

The ten Invincible Dao Ancestors kept retreating.

What is a half-step domain ancestor, the first condition is that the forbidden body is tempered to the realm of Dacheng, and half of the Dao power of a body is transformed into forbidden power, which is transformed into forbidden power, not containing forbidden attributes, these two meanings are different.

And this mysterious person's forbidden body has reached Dacheng, and it is estimated that it has the effect of refining eighty percent, but it is not an ordinary Dacheng.

Moreover, the forbidden weapon in his body is extremely precious, and it can also increase combat effectiveness.

The reason why they were 100% sure that the other party was a half-step domain ancestor was that the other party contained a trace of the aura of the domain ancestor, which was the iconic identity of the half-step domain ancestor.

"Who is Your Excellency?"

The Peerless Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect asked in a low voice.

However, the other party did not answer, but shot directly.

Fast!

It's so fast!

I saw that one of the other party's hands turned into a forbidden hand, tearing everything and cutting it off.

Burst!

One of the hands of the Peerless Dao Ancestor was directly shattered by the other party, and his entire body also flew out.

"Run away, he is a half-step Domain Ancestor, and through a trace of Domain Ancestor aura, he can exert a strength equivalent to a sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!" shouted the Peerless Dao Ancestor to another invincible Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect.

"Want to escape?"

The True Martial Palace Lord sneered.

Immediately, the forbidden realm was activated, enveloping the area.

His forbidden body has been tempered to the realm of Dacheng, how powerful the forbidden realm is, the binding force is too strong, even the invincible Dao Ancestors are difficult to break free.

The True Martial Palace Lord did not kill the three Nine Heavens forces and the Black Wind Mountain Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor first, but set his sights on the three major Scattered Cultivation Invincible Dao Ancestors, which was the most cost-effective plan.

If you kill the Invincible Dao Ancestor of the Nine Heavens Force first, you may just kill one, and the Half-Step Domain Ancestor may come, but it is different to kill the Invincible Dao Ancestor of the Scattered Cultivation, you may kill three, and there will be no half-step Domain Ancestor appear.

He didn't want to kill just one and be stopped, it was a very bad feeling.

Immediately, he set his sights on the invincible Dao Ancestor of Scattered Cultivation - Qinghe Dao Ancestor!
